title: Cancelled trial can be reactivated
description: The retry handler treats cancelled subscriptions as recoverable.
requirement: REQ-STATE-2: A cancelled trial remains cancelled and may not be reactivated by retry.
seededViolation: Every non-active subscription is set to active.
whyItMatters: A user can be restored to a service they explicitly cancelled.

expectedFindings.title: Retry reactivates cancelled trials
expectedFindings.description: The handler changes cancelled trials to active.

distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: Avoiding a redundant write is correct.
